title: schmidtottia monantha
intro: Schmidtottia monantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to Hawaii, characterized by its yellow flowers and small leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. Herbal preparations of Schmidtottia monantha include teas and infusions made from the leaves and flowers, which are said to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
